title: Capillary blood self-collection for high-throughput proteomics.
author: El-Sabawi B Huang S Tanriverdi K Perry AS Amancherla K Jackson N Hulsey J Freedman JE Shah R Lindman BR
content: S-EPMC11834985 PMC11834985 Capillary blood self-collection for high-throughput proteomics. In this study, we sought to compare protein concentrations obtained from a high-throughput proteomics platform (Olink) on samples collected using capillary blood self-collection (with the Tasso+ device
